title: Bardo Thodol: The Peaceful and Wrathful Deities
description: The detailed descriptions of the 42 peaceful and 58 wrathful deities encountered in the bardo — all projections of one's own mind.
introduction: The detailed descriptions of the 42 peaceful and 58 wrathful deities encountered in the bardo — all projections of one's own mind.

translation.original_text: On the first day, from the central realm, the blue light of the dharmakaya will shine.
